Place locally hosted copies of these libraries in this folder:
- xlsx.full.min.js (SheetJS 0.18.5)
- firebase-app-compat.js (Firebase 9.22.0)
- firebase-auth-compat.js (Firebase 9.22.0)
- firebase-firestore-compat.js (Firebase 9.22.0)
- quill.min.js (Quill 2.0.3)
- quill.snow.css (Quill 2.0.3 Snow theme)
